db.name:
DB to use. If not specified, default DB 0 will be used.
+optional

hostAddress.name: HostAddress refers to the address of the Redis host/server

jsonBody.name:
JSONBody specifies that all event body payload coming from this
source will be JSON
+optional

metadata.name:
Metadata holds the user defined metadata which will passed along the event payload.
+optional

namespace.name:
Namespace to use to retrieve the password from. It should only be specified if password is declared
+optional

password.name:
Password required for authentication if any.
+optional

tls.name:
TLS configuration for the redis client.
+optional

username.name:
Username required for ACL style authentication if any.
+optional
